title: Toward the design of allosteric effectors: gaining comprehensive control of drug properties and actions

primary_findings.therapeutic_potential: Allosteric drugs offer significant advantages for comprehensive drug property control
primary_findings.design_framework: Systematic approaches to allosteric effector design
primary_findings.application: Improved therapeutics with better selectivity and safety profiles

allosteric_drug_advantages.mechanism: Modulate protein function through distal site binding

drug_design_objectives.comprehensive_control: Simultaneous optimization of multiple drug properties

allosteric_design_considerations.modulation_type: Positive, negative, or biased allosteric modulation
